mapper.select: SELECT yr.year, CAST(SUM(yr.leave_use_dcnt) AS NUMERIC(7,1)) AS used_dcnt FROM ( SELECT m.req_user_id, m.req_sn, SUBSTR(MIN(d.leave_use_ymd), 1, 4) AS year, m.leave_use_dcnt FROM int_leave_req_mst m JOIN int_leave_req_dtl d ON d.req_user_id = m.req_user_id AND d.req_sn = m.req_sn JOIN int_leave_mst lm ON lm.leave_cd = m.leave_cd WHERE m.req_user_id = #{userId} AND m.aprv_rslt_se = '3' AND lm.ded_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY m.req_user_id, m.req_sn, m.leave_use_dcnt ) yr GROUP BY yr.year ORDER BY yr.year DESC
